postToolUse.description: Run markdown formatting in enforce mode and log only failures/skips.
postToolUse.bash:
mode="${VSTACK_HOOKS_MODE:-audit}"
if [ "$mode" != "enforce" ]; then
  exit 0
fi
input="$(cat)"
append_log() {
  log_name="${VSTACK_HOOK_LOG_NAME:-hook-markdown-quality-alerts.log}"
  log_root="${VSTACK_HOOK_LOG_DIR:-.vstack/logs}"
  log_dir="$log_root/$(date -u +%Y%m%d)"
  mkdir -p "$log_dir"
  printf '%s\n' "$1" >> "$log_dir/$log_name"
}
if ! printf '%s' "$input" | grep -Eiq '\.md|docs/|\.github/|\.vstack/templates/|adr/|prompt\.md|instructions\.md|SKILL\.md'; then
  exit 0
fi
if [ -f Makefile ] && command -v make >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  make markdown-format >/dev/null 2>&1 || \
    make format >/dev/null 2>&1 || \
    append_log 'markdown-format-run-failed'
else
  append_log 'markdown-format-skipped-missing-make-or-makefile'
fi
